notes: Houston's complete network redesign replaced coverage-focused routes with frequent corridors. The University Line saw a 204% ridership increase within 18 months of frequency improvements.
Charlotte invested in streetcar extension through historically underserved West End neighborhoods. Ridership tripled with consistent 12-minute headways and weekend service addition.

Columbus launched Ohio's first BRT line along High Street corridor. Despite COVID-era launch, BRT achieved 132% ridership lift over the local route it replaced, demonstrating latent demand even under adverse conditions.
